title:
PROMPT 021: Bar Chart Mini вЂ” KPI Snapshot
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 3.5s | LOOP: No
SVG: Mini bar chart (8 paths: 5 bars of varying height + baseline + 2 axis lines) вЂ” lower-center 960Г—600px, 220px wide total, bars 28px wide, 20px gap

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #0F172A (dark navy)
Axis lines stroke: #334155 (medium dark grey, 2px)
Bar 1 fill: #3B82F6 (blue) вЂ” height 90px
Bar 2 fill: #3B82F6 вЂ” height 130px
Bar 3 fill: #3B82F6 вЂ” height 110px
Bar 4 fill: #6366F1 (indigo вЂ” highlight bar) вЂ” height 170px
Bar 5 fill: #3B82F6 вЂ” height 140px
Bar top glow (bar 4 only): #818CF840 (indigo 25% glow)
Baseline stroke: #475569 (2px)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Five bars growing from baseline at Y:640. Bar 4 is tallest (highlighted bar).
Axes visible: Y-axis left, baseline bottom. No labels (clean icon version).

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.5s total):
0вЂ“0.4s: Axes draw in (Y-axis topв†’bottom, baseline leftв†’right, stroke-dashoffset, ease-out).
0.4вЂ“0.9s: Bars 1вЂ“3 grow from baseline (scaleY 0 в†’ target, transform-origin bottom, ease-out, 0.15s stagger between bars).
0.9вЂ“1.3s: Bar 4 grows (slight delay, grows faster вЂ” ease-out). Glow appears on bar 4 top.
1.3вЂ“1.6s: Bar 5 grows (ease-out).
1.6вЂ“2.0s: All bars complete. Bar 4 pulses glow (blur 0 в†’ 16px в†’ 0, ease-in-out).
2.0вЂ“2.5s: All bars hold. Subtle up-tick: all bars grow additional 5% (scaleY в†’ 1.05 в†’ 1.0, ease-in-out). "Growth" feel.
2.5вЂ“3.5s: Hold.

EASING CURVES:
- Axis draw: ease-out
- Bar grow: ease-out
- Glow pulse: ease-in-out
- Up-tick: ease-in-out
